examples: Nearly 970 prisoners escaped from a prison in the city of Lubumbashi earlier this month.
Many polling stations in Lubumbashi failed to open, in part because of an earlier attack on vehicles carrying voting materials.
Ms Kalunga stands talking to her visitors surrounded by 40 well-watered hectares of vegetable gardens in Kamilombe, 15 kilometres west of Lubumbashi.
Later on Saturday witnesses said soldiers were continuing to patrol key locations in Lubumbashi.
Yet, for a time last week, the president made himself scarce, retiring to Lubumbashi in his home area.
